name: Chapter-Llama
description: A CLAMS wrapper for Chapter-Llama, a video chaptering system that uses LLMs (Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct with LoRA adapters) to partition long videos into chapters with timestamps and titles. It processes speech transcripts (ASR) as text input to the LLM.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Chapter-Llama LoRA model variant to use.

parameters.name: windowTokenSize
parameters.description: Token size for each processing window. Longer videos are split into windows of this size.

parameters.name: firstWindowOnly
parameters.description: Process only the first window (for debugging).

parameters.name: quantization
parameters.description: Quantization method to reduce GPU memory usage. '4bit' reduces ~75%, '8bit' reduces ~50%, 'none' uses full precision.

parameters.name: pretty
parameters.description: The JSON body of the HTTP response will be re-formatted with 2-space indentation

parameters.name: runningTime
parameters.description: The running time of the app will be recorded in the view metadata

parameters.name: hwFetch
parameters.description: The hardware information (architecture, GPU and vRAM) will be recorded in the view metadata
